item.title: Bed Bath & Beyond Is Returning to a State It Once Vowed to Avoid
item.description: Less than a year after pulling out of California, the retailer is back with a new store strategy.

item.title: New Gene Therapy Can Restore Hearing in Deaf Kids—And It Comes With an Unexpected Price Tag
item.description: A breakthrough FDA-approved treatment is changing how genetic deafness is treated.

item.title: America Is Running Out of Primary Care Doctors. AI Is Filling the Gap
item.description: OpenAI just announced a new product for physicians and healthcare providers. But Amazon, Google, and other players are taking it a step further.

item.title: $34,000 From a Hairdryer? Police Are Investigating a Weather Sensor Hack at a Major Airport Linked to Crypto Bets
item.description: Unusual temperature readings at Charles de Gaulle airport lined up suspiciously well with winning bets on Polymarket—and investigators think someone m...

item.title: Marc Jacobs Made a Social-First Series With Rachel Sennott. It Might Be the Future of Advertising
item.description: The fashion label becomes the latest brand to experiment with a made-for-social show
